message:
chore(beads): remove stale br_history snapshot from 2026-02-18

Clean up rotated beads issue tracker history file that is no longer
needed after the latest br_history rotation cycle. This follows the
established pattern of periodically pruning old snapshot files to
keep the repository tidy.
